description: The GradientSkyMaterial component is used in Skybox to make a gradient type sky for use in worlds.
usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a Skybox component and use the SetCurrentSky() Sync Method to use this component. Don't forget to add some ``_gradients`` to the list.

notes.title: Gradient
notes.text: Gradient is a nested type used in the ``_gradients`` list.
